note: m^2 is Casimir-linear not Regge-linear (C3-1 Verdict C); a true Regge alpha' is undefined.  alpha_C is the rigid-rotor Casimir slope.  The lattice->GeV^-2 map needs a non-derived energy scale, so the only honest QCD comparison is dimensionless -- and since the scaling law itself differs (J(J+1) vs J), it is INDETERMINATE.
